rows.description: Allowed a years Land Tax at 3£/7ᵈ
rows.notes: Description drawn from gemini-flash, which combined the main text line with the handwritten annotation '3£/7d'. Visual verification confirms this interpretation. No monetary amounts appear in the primary ledger columns.
rows.section_header: Allowed a years Land Tax at 3£/7ᵈ

rows.description: from Ladyday 1768. To Ladyday -69.
rows.notes: Consensus on row type and empty amounts. Description drawn from gemini-flash, which is a perfect match for the visible text. GPT-5-mini's transcription was slightly different ('-- 69' vs '-69').

rows.description: Yr Bray recd. ye Ballance so accounted for it for 11th
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts (245-2-9) and row type. Description is a manual reconciliation from both extractors and visual verification, correcting minor transcription errors (e.g., 'ye' vs 'of', 'Ballance' spelling).
rows.english_description: Balance received and accounted for by Mr Bray.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Balance received and accounted for by Mr Bray, amounting to £245 2s 9d.

rows.description: Rec'd (by Mr Bray) Mr Markham's second payment

rows.english_description: Second payment from Mr Markham, received by Mr Bray.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Second payment from Mr Markham, amount not recorded.

rows.english_description: Benefaction due from Mr Morbridge for 1763, payable at Midsummer.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Benefaction due from Mr Morbridge for 1763, amount not recorded.

rows.notes: Adopted from gemini-flash. Amount (100-0-0) and description are clear and correct. This amount corresponds to the multi-line entry spanning rows 4-6. gpt-5-mini also had the correct amount but merged the description.
